summary: Iteration 18: Bilingual PDF Visual Verification Testing. Verified that both Form and Proposal bilingual PDFs have NO text overlap (English left, Arabic right columns properly separated), company seal is FULLY VISIBLE in Proposal PDF (not cut off), and Arabic text renders correctly (no black boxes) using Amiri font. All 11 tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: draw_field() function in server.py correctly separates columns: English label at X=50, English value at X=145, Arabic value at X=width-160, Arabic label at X=width-50
Company seal positioning uses max(y - 80, 55) to ensure minimum 55px above footer - preventing cutoff
Amiri Arabic font (Regular and Bold) properly registered and embedded in PDFs
Footer displays bilingual company name correctly: 'BAYAN Auditing & Conformity | بيان للتدقيق والمطابقة'
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Form ID: c31d4310-267b-4e06-8ed5-f7abb8dc8272, Proposal ID: 0b5f8409-af5c-43fc-963b-bd9e58ee86a6
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bilingual PDF layout bugs have been fixed and verified. The draw_field function now uses separated X-coordinates to prevent text overlap, and the company seal positioning uses max() to ensure it stays above the footer. Both Form and Proposal PDFs render correctly with Amiri Arabic font.

findings: English labels positioned at X=50 (left side)
Arabic labels positioned at X=width-50 (right side)
NO TEXT OVERLAP observed in visual inspection
Same column separation pattern as Form PDF
NO TEXT OVERLAP observed in visual inspection
PDF size: 454,086 bytes (includes company seal image)
Company seal (BAC logo) is FULLY VISIBLE in Proposal PDF
Seal positioned with adequate margin above footer
Code uses seal_y = max(y - 80, 55) to prevent footer overlap
Arabic text renders correctly using Amiri font (no black boxes)
Arabic reshaper + BiDi algorithm properly applied
